---
title: "ContexG League Tables"
description: "Big 5 league tables with contexG for, against, and home-away splits."
image: thumb.jpg
categories: [football]
format:
  html:
    toc: false
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
dashboard_order: 5
---

2025-2026 season. Metrics are shown on a per-game basis.

Turn to landscape on phone for better viewing.

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(DT)

style_grad <- function(x, base_pal, n=101) {
  rng <- range(x, na.rm=TRUE)
  if (!is.finite(rng[1]) || !is.finite(rng[2]) || rng[1] == rng[2]) return(NULL)
  cols <- grDevices::colorRampPalette(base_pal)(n)
  cuts <- seq(rng[1], rng[2], length.out=n)[-1]
  list(cuts=cuts, cols=cols)
}

pal_g2r <- c("#1a9850","#66bd63","#a6d96a","#d9ef8b","#fee08b","#fdae61","#d73027")
pal_r2g <- rev(pal_g2r)

make_league_dt <- function(csv_path) {
  if (!file.exists(csv_path)) {
    return(
      DT::datatable(
        data.frame(Message = paste0("Missing file: ", csv_path)),
        rownames = FALSE,
        options = list(dom = "t", paging = FALSE)
      )
    )
  }

  df_raw <- read_csv(csv_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

  df <- df_raw |>
    mutate(
      contexg_for = as.numeric(contexg_for),
      contexg_against = as.numeric(contexg_against),
      contexg_difference = as.numeric(contexg_difference),
      home_contexg_difference = as.numeric(home_contexg_difference),
      away_contexg_difference = as.numeric(away_contexg_difference),
      home_away_contexg_difference_gap = as.numeric(home_away_contexg_difference_gap)
    ) |>
    rename(
      Team = team_name,
      P = played,
      Pts = points,
      GD = goal_difference,
      `ContexG<br>For` = contexg_for,
      `ContexG<br>Against` = contexg_against,
      `ContexG<br>Diff` = contexg_difference,
      `Home<br>ContexG Diff` = home_contexg_difference,
      `Away<br>ContexG Diff` = away_contexg_difference,
      `Home-Away<br>Gap` = home_away_contexg_difference_gap
    ) |>
    arrange(desc(Pts), desc(GD), desc(`ContexG<br>Diff`))

  g2r_cols <- c("Pts", "GD", "ContexG<br>For", "ContexG<br>Diff", "Home<br>ContexG Diff", "Away<br>ContexG Diff", "Home-Away<br>Gap")
  r2g_cols <- c("ContexG<br>Against")

  dt <- datatable(
    df,
    rownames = FALSE,
    escape = FALSE,
    extensions = "FixedColumns",
    options = list(
      dom = "t",
      paging = FALSE,
      scrollX = TRUE,
      autoWidth = FALSE,
      fixedColumns = list(leftColumns = 1),
      initComplete = JS(
        "function(settings) {",
        "  setTimeout(function() {",
        "    $(settings.nTable).DataTable().columns.adjust();",
        "  }, 0);",
        "}"
      ),
      drawCallback = JS(
        "function(settings) {",
        "  $(settings.nTable).DataTable().columns.adjust();",
        "}"
      ),
      headerCallback = JS(
        "function(thead) {",
        "  $(thead).find('th').css({",
        "    'font-size': '11px',",
        "    'padding': '4px 6px',",
        "    'white-space': 'normal',",
        "    'line-height': '1.05'",
        "  });",
        "}"
      ),
      columnDefs = list(
        list(width = "260px", targets = 0),
        list(width = "48px", targets = c(1, 2, 3)),
        list(width = "96px", targets = c(4, 5, 6)),
        list(width = "130px", targets = c(7, 8, 9)),
        list(className = "dt-nowrap", targets = 0),
        list(className = "dt-right", targets = 1:(ncol(df) - 1))
      )
    )
  )

  round_cols <- setdiff(names(df), c("Team", "P", "Pts", "GD"))
  dt <- dt |>
    formatRound(round_cols, digits = 2) |>
    formatStyle(names(df), fontSize = "12px", padding = "2px 6px") |>
    formatStyle("Team", whiteSpace = "nowrap")

  for (col in g2r_cols) {
    s <- style_grad(df[[col]], pal_r2g)
    if (!is.null(s)) dt <- dt |> formatStyle(col, backgroundColor = styleInterval(s$cuts, s$cols))
  }
  for (col in r2g_cols) {
    s <- style_grad(df[[col]], pal_g2r)
    if (!is.null(s)) dt <- dt |> formatStyle(col, backgroundColor = styleInterval(s$cuts, s$cols))
  }

  dt
}
```

:::{.panel-tabset}

## Premier League

```{r}
make_league_dt("contexg_attack_defence_league_table_premier_league.csv")
```

## Serie A

```{r}
make_league_dt("contexg_attack_defence_league_table_serie_a.csv")
```

## La Liga

```{r}
make_league_dt("contexg_attack_defence_league_table_la_liga.csv")
```

## Ligue 1

```{r}
make_league_dt("contexg_attack_defence_league_table_ligue_1.csv")
```

## Bundesliga

```{r}
make_league_dt("contexg_attack_defence_league_table_bundesliga.csv")
```

:::

<div style="font-size: 0.85em; line-height: 1.25; margin-top: 0.75rem;">
  <h3 style="margin-bottom: 0.25rem;">Notes</h3>
  <ul style="margin-top: 0;">
    <li><b>ContexG For</b> and <b>ContexG Against</b> are per-game averages.</li>
    <li><b>Home-Away Gap</b> = home per-game contexG difference minus away per-game contexG difference.</li>
    <li>Tables are ordered like a league table: points, goal difference, then contexG difference.</li>
  </ul>
</div>
